messages.text: This seems to be an energy weapon of some sort. These charge packs nearby look  like they should fit...
This looks like a ventilation duct... Maybe I can use these to move around      without being tracked.
I think I can get past now I've taken out the fan mechanism.
There's something on this side of that big pillar, down near the bottom...
Time to get out of here before all his friends show up!
Sky! Well, I know I made it down to the planet surface, at least.
This looks like the way out. If the generators are disabled the magnetic locks  won't function, and with the right passkey neither will the backup systems....
From what I can gather the exit is magnetically sealed, with the power coming   from two generators located here in the base.   Time for a power cut I reckon...
Uh oh.                       That was a really bad idea.                        A really REALLY bad idea.
